name: oyster-waitlist-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker collecting Oyster Pro waitlist signups

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute oyster-waitlist --file=migrations/0001_init.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute oyster-waitlist --file=migrations/0002_add_last_sent_at.sql --remote
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute oyster-waitlist --file=migrations/0001_init.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute oyster-waitlist --file=migrations/0002_add_last_sent_at.sql --local
scripts.db:dump: wrangler d1 execute oyster-waitlist --remote --command="SELECT email FROM waitlist ORDER BY joined_at"
